signals.headline: XRPL Launches On-Ledger RISC-V ZK Verifier for Programmable Privacy | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRPL Launches On-Ledger RISC-V ZK Verifier for Programmable Privacy | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRPL Commons and Boundless have collaborated to deploy a RISC-V zero-knowledge (ZK) verifier directly on the XRP Ledger, making it the first public blockchain with built-in programmable privacy and compliance controls; rollout includes Q2 2026 "Smart Escrows" requiring ZK proofs for fund release, follow

signals.raw:

signals.headline: Bybit Launches XRPfi Yield Product with Doppler Finance (Up to 5% APR) | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Bybit Launches XRPfi Yield Product with Doppler Finance (Up to 5% APR) | YES | MED confidence**  
Bybit rolled out XRPfi on April 14, 2026—a 90-day fixed-term yield strategy offering up to 5% APR (including 2.5% bonus from 30,000 XRP pool) through July 12, 2026; assets stay on-platform with market-neutral execution by Doppler Finance.[4]
